name: Entry & Orchestration
description: CLI entry point and pipeline coordinator that wire all components together for end-to-end analysis runs.

name: Parsing
description: Parser abstractions, parser selection, and tree-sitter-backed source parsing for JavaScript and JSX files.

name: AST Walking
description: AST traversal contracts and tree-sitter walking logic that dispatch parsed nodes to extractors.

name: Fact Extraction
description: Extractor contracts and concrete AST extractors that derive imports, exports, functions, calls, and classes as facts.

name: Output
description: Fact writer abstractions, JSON serialization, and representative generated fact output artifacts.

name: Configuration
description: Project and analysis configuration files that define package metadata and ignore rules for repository and tooling behavior.
